UnitAbilities.Title: Fearsome (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brutal Example
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can target that unit with the Insane Bravery Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enforcer
UnitAbilities.Text: This model's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Covering Fire
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

Infos.Title: HEAVY WEAPONS TEAM
Infos.Text: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Renegade Heavy Weapons Team model counts as two models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wall of Muscle
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: OGRYNS
Infos.Text: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Renegade Plague Ogryn model counts as one Terminator model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Interceptor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bomb Rack
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Favour (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infernal Speed
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, change the Move characteristic of models in that unit to 14".

UnitAbilities.Title: Ogryn Combat Stimms
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Infos.Title: OGRYNS
Infos.Text: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Renegade Ogryn Brute model counts as one Terminator model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cursed Wardings (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Barrier (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this Psyker’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Voltagheist Field
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: SERVANTS OF THE ABYSS
Infos.Text: If a unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Cultist Mob, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mischief Makers (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Poxes (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flames of Change (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Altered Reality (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to a 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prescience (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unholy Power
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model's unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Units.Name: CHAOS LORD ON STEED OF SLAANESH

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Chaos Lord on Steed of Slaanesh

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cut Off Their Escape
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of this model’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

Units.Name: CHAOS LORD ON PALANQUIN OF NURGLE

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Chaos Lord on Palanquin of Nurgle

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Revolting Regeneration
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Units.Name: CHAOS LORD ON DISC OF TZEENTCH

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Chaos Lord on Disc of Tzeentch

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Fate
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bloody Stampede
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Beastmaster
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains an Ogryn Pack Master model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and each time a Chaos Mauler Hound model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Swift Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Spearhead
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Champion
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aspire to Glory
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model’s unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, add D3 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by this model.

LeaderInfo.Description:
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one other Character model has already been attached to it (a unit cannot have two Exalted Champions attached to it).
If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

Options: bolt pistol and brutal assault weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: For the Dark Gods
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Cultist Mob, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Infos.Title: CULTIST MOB
Infos.Text: Chaos Cultists are the mortal devotees of the Dark Gods, ordinary men and women fallen to promises of temporal power who take to battle in huge numbers. Bearing a motley collection of improvised, stolen and makeshift weapons, they can overwhelm even determined enemies with sheer weight of numbers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infernal Regeneration
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hovering Death
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dreadclaw Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Heretic Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Possessed and Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can instead transport 1 Helbrute or Dreadnought model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scuttling Gait
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Runes of the Blood God
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-9 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bloodlust
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, once per battle, this model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kharybdis Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 22 Heretic Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Possessed and Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can instead transport 1 Helbrute or Dreadnought model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Thunderhawk Cluster Bombs
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1–10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1–10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 30 Heretic Astartes Infantry or Heretic Astartes Mounted models. Each Jump Pack, Possessed and Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. Each Mounted model takes up the space of 4 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Marked by the Dark Gods
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Combat Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with 1 combi-bolter in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Chaos Bikers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Host
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 9", and it has a 5+ invulnerable save. Add the Daemon keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Possessed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Raptors.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sigil of Corruption
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness and Wounds characteristics to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Terminator keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Chaos Terminator Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dark Zealotry
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if a different unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Mechanisms
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Heretic Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gift of Chaos (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, after resolving its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that had the [PSYCHIC] ability. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Combat Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with 1 combi-bolter in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Chaos Bikers.

UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness and Wounds characteristics to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Terminator keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Chaos Terminator Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonkin
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if a different unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prescience
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skulking Nightmare
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sigil of Corruption

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Line-breaker
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it with Blast weapons (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Deredeo Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Powerful Volley
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model shoots in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, all [HEAVY] weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pinning Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sunderer of Fortresses
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Vehicle, improve the Strength and Damage characteristic of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a Fortification unit, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

UnitAbilities.Title: Rolling Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fellblade model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan-killer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its twin Falchion volcano cannon that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inviolable Transport
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 45 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Possessed or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion or Obliterator model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 2 Dreadnought or Helbrute models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic e.g. A Dreadnought with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models).
